title: Change ENZOxSENSI text color to white

requirements.text: Update the ENZOxSENSI title text color to white in the App.tsx header component. Modify the text styling to use white color (text-white or equivalent CSS class) for the ENZOxSENSI branding text displayed in the header.

quotes: ENZOxSENSI SHOULD BE IN WHITE COLOR

acceptanceCriteria: The ENZOxSENSI text in the header displays in white color
The text color change is visible against the black background
No other text colors in the application are affected

nonGoals: Changing colors of other text elements in the application
Changing the red accent color scheme
